channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Riley Leonard's passing game improvement key for Notre Dame in CFP quarterfinal against Georgia
item.description: Riley Leonard's improvement in the passing game will be a key part of seventh-seeded Notre Dame's game plan against second-seeded Georgia in the College Football Playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Curt Rallo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: California appeals court overturns Super Bowl champ's rape conviction due to racial discrimination
item.description: Former San Francisco 49ers star Dana Stubblefield saw his rape conviction overturned by a California appeals court last week. He was convicted in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Six former Florida State players suing coach Leonard Hamilton over failed NIL payments
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Six former Florida State basketball players sued Seminoles coach Leonard Hamilton on Monday, alleging he failed to make good on a promise to get each of them $250,000 in name, image and likeness compensation. The plaintiffs — Darin Green Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Imane Khelif and the biggest controversies in sports in 2024
item.description: As we reflect on the Year 2024, let's take a look back at some of the biggest controversies in the world of sports, including a few from this year's Olympic Games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: JuJu Watkins scores 31 points to propel No. 4 Southern California past No. 23 Michigan 78-58
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 31 points, making 13 of 14 free throws, and No. 4 Southern California beat No. 23 Michigan 78-58 on Sunday night in the Trojans’ Big Ten home opener. Watkins had five rebounds, seven assists, three steals and three blocks.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bills troll Jets with Pop-Tarts video after clinching No. 2 seed in AFC playoffs
item.description: The Buffalo Bills had one last troll for the New York Jets on Sunday after their 40-14 win to officially clinch the No. 2 seed in the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: All smiles as Djokovic and Kyrgios treat crowd to flashy shots in doubles win
item.description: Exchanging smiles, laughs and flashy shots, Novak Djokovic and Nick Kyrgios have teamed up in doubles as they both returned to the court in preparation for the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chip Kelly returns to the Rose Bowl, this time as Ohio State's offensive coordinator
item.description: Of all the things Chip Kelly is looking forward to in his return trip to Southern California, there is one that rises above everything else. “Gotta get more sunscreen looking at the weather report, because we haven’t seen the sun for a little while in Columbus," said Kelly with a wry smile.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Falcons run out of time to control their path to the playoffs after mismanaging the clock
item.description: The Atlanta Falcons have run out of time to control their path to the playoffs after mismanaging the clock multiple times in an overtime loss at the Washington Commanders.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 2024 Holiday Bowl: Homegrown Cougars leave it all on the field in front of hometown crowd
item.description: While a depleted Washington State may not have tasted any eggnog this year in the Holiday Bowl after falling short to Syracuse 52-35, a few San Diego locals still making a memory of a lifetime playing on the big stage in front of their hometown crowd.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing and moves within 100 of Dickerson's record
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley normally would have tossed his game-used cleats to the kid who asked for the pair as the star Philadelphia Eagles running back ran off the field and back to the locker room. Sorry, kid. Not today.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hunter and Sanders close successful chapter at Colorado despite blowout loss to BYU in Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — On the scoreboard, Travis Hunter and Shedeur Sanders went out with a whimper at Colorado. But their lasting impact in Boulder — both on the field and off — was probably immeasurable.
item.dc:creator: RAUL DOMINGUEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago brings losing streak into matchup with Dallas
item.description: Dallas Stars (20-13-1, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (12-22-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Sunday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks look to break their three-game skid when they play the Dallas Stars.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs Seahawks Preview: Inactives, Caleb Williams' development and a shot at the wrong kind of history
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — For the last time this season, the Chicago Bears will take to Soldier Field with a bit of dubious history on the line. The Bears (4-11) are losers of nine straight and will take on a Seattle Seahawks squad (8-7) who's playoff hopes dangle in the balance.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears to host Inspire Change Game at final home game of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL's Inspire Change initiative is hosting a game at Soldier Field to raise awareness for social justice causes, featuring players wearing "Inspire Change" gear, special edition merchandise, and in-stadium activations.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Why Netflix is streaming NFL games on Christmas Day
item.description: To make the events even more enthralling, Mariah Carey is set to perform ahead of kick-off while Beyoncé is taking over halftime of the Ravens-Texans game.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Panthers Tkachuk helped off the ice after collision with Tampa Bay's Kucherov
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk had to be helped off the ice and taken to the locker room following a collision with Tampa Bay's Nikita Kucherov during Monday night's game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Danny DeVito recalls spilling Coke on floor while attending Blazers game in 1975
item.description: Beloved Hollywood celebrity Danny DeVito appeared on former NFL wide receiver Julian Edelman’s podcast “Games with Names” on Dec. 3, where he shared a story about a night out in Portland with Jack Nicholson while the actors were filming “One Flew Over the Cuckoo’s Nest” in January of 1975.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, NewsNation
